697c313c766076527b0e7bbc.question: Note to players: There are no consistent, formal definitions of a “town” vs. a “city” vs. a “village” vs. a “metro area.” In general, “town” will be used for smaller municipalities. Victor Gruen proposed carving out a central car-free business district in this city partly surrounded by Belknap Street as part of his "City X" project. The W. Lee O'Daniel Flour Co. based in this city sponsored a band immortalized in the photo, "Please Pass the Biscuits, Pappy!" Michelangelo's The Torment of Saint Anthony is a highlight of an art museum in this city noted for its skylights that was designed by Louis Kahn. Garry Winogrand’s last photobook was of the Fat Stock Show in this (*) “Cowtown” along the Chisholm Trail. This city, the most populous in Tarrant County, makes up the majority of the western portion of the Metroplex. The National Juneteenth Museum is being built in this city. This 11th-most-populous city in the United States is home to the Kimbell Art Museum. For 10 points, name this city that co-names an airport with nearby Dallas.
